title: Grilled Tunisian Peppers with Crusty Bread
description: A flavorful and spicy side dish, perfect for accompanying your favorite Mexican dishes. The smoky flavor of grilled peppers pairs beautifully with crusty bread.
instructions: Brush the Tunisian peppers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the peppers for 10-12 minutes, or until charred and tender.
Meanwhile, toast the peppery bread slices until crispy.
Serve the grilled peppers with toasted bread strips and a sprinkle of white for added flavor.
